productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Casual Black Shoes
description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort, this casual suede shoe from united colors of benetton is packed with features to offer you a stable and comfortable ride. Upper Suede upper with contrast coloured overlays for style Mildly padded tongue and collar, with a fabric inner lining for comfort Lacing system for a custom Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Clean upper using a suede brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
